results.title: 1st ODI: Axar Patel picks career-best 4-62 as India restrict England to 258
results.description: Birmingham, July 14 (IANS) All-rounder Axar Patel brought out his career-best performance of 4-62 as Joe Root was left stranded on the other end at 76 to guide England to 258 all out in 47.5 overs in the first ODI against India at the Edgbaston Stadium in Birmingham on Tuesday. England bounced back from a ...

results.title: Dilip Joshi Remains a Key Player in Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Amid Rumors
results.description: The popular sitcom Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is set to celebrate its 18th anniversary, but recent rumors about Dilip Joshi's departure have sparked concern among fans. The show's producers have clarified that Joshi will continue to play Jethalal, assuring viewers that the upcoming storylines will still focus on his character. Over the years, many actors have left the show for various reasons, but Joshi's long-standing presence remains a cornerstone of this beloved series. Discover more about the show's history and cast changes in the full article.

results.title: India Post Achieves Record Business Growth in Q1 2026-27
results.description: In a recent meeting, Union Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia announced that India Post has achieved a record revenue of ₹4,008.95 crore in the first quarter of the financial year 2026-27. This marks a remarkable 22.2% increase compared to the previous year, highlighting the department's transformation into a modern, citizen-centric organization. The minister outlined strategic priorities for the upcoming quarters, focusing on logistics, new business opportunities, and enhancing citizen services. This achievement is seen as a testament to the dedication of postal employees and the trust placed in India Post by millions of citizens. Discover more about the future plans and growth strategies of India Post in the full article.
